# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#  AUDIOBOOK FOLDER — README
#
#  Place your audio files here.
#  Supported formats: .mp3  .wav  .ogg
#
#  CHAPTER MARKERS (optional, you author this):
#    Create a text file with the SAME base name as your audio file:
#      mybook.mp3  →  mybook.chapters.txt
#
#    Format (one entry per line):
#      Chapter Name,timestamp_in_seconds
#      Prologue,0
#      Chapter 1 - The Road,125.5
#
#  USER BOOKMARKS (auto-generated by the app):
#    The app creates  mybook.bookmarks.txt  automatically when the
#    player adds a bookmark. Safe to hand-edit, but don't rename it.
#
#  EXAMPLE:
#    hobbit.mp3
#    hobbit.chapters.txt    ← you create this
#    hobbit.bookmarks.txt   ← app creates/updates this
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
